name: eBay Returns Settings
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your returns settings let customers know the terms for returning purchases they've made. If you're using Business Policies, set your returns on the "}, {"text": "Payment, Shipping & Returns", "bold": true}, {"text": ". We recommend 39 days."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Leave the "}, {"text": "Refund will be given as", "bold": true}, {"text": " blank."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select an option from the "}, {"text": "Return shipping will be paid by", "bold": true}, {"text": " drop-down menu.
